summary: Completed testing of iteration 15 features: New logo (ucan-logo-rojo.svg) everywhere and Blind review system. All tests passed.

issues: Google Maps API error shown (existing issue, not related to this iteration)

passed_tests: Home page shows new large logo (/ucan-logo-rojo.svg) with data-testid='home-logo' and classes h-28 sm:h-36 lg:h-44
Register page shows role selection (Busco un Cuidador / Quiero ser Cuidador) - regression
POST /api/reviews/client creates client review with published=false and publish_after field
POST /api/reviews/client returns message about blind publishing (7 dias / ambos)
Provider profile reviews query only shows published reviews (or legacy reviews without published field)
GET /api/reviews/provider/given returns reviews with published status for UI badges
Email login works with admin@ucan.cl / admin123 - regression
Dashboard loads with pets section - regression
critical_code_review_comments: Blind review logic correctly implemented: published=false on create, publish_after=now+7days
Cross-publish logic: when counterpart review exists unpublished, both get published=true
Provider profile reviews query uses $or to handle legacy reviews: {published: true} OR {published: {$exists: false}}
Auto-publish expired reviews on GET endpoints (provider detail, client reviews)
UI correctly handles legacy reviews (without published field) using !== false check
Logo updated in 4 locations: Home hero (large), Navbar, Login, Register
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/ProviderDashboard.jsx (fixed badge logic for legacy reviews: published !== false)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test users from iteration 14.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested blind review system and new logo. Key features: 1) Reviews created with POST /api/reviews or /api/reviews/client now have published=false and publish_after (7 days). 2) When both sides review each other, both reviews get published=true simultaneously. 3) Auto-publish runs on GET endpoints when publish_after date passes. 4) Legacy reviews (from before blind system) don't have published field - UI handles with !== false check. 5) New logo ucan-logo-rojo.svg used everywhere. Logo file at /app/frontend/public/ucan-logo-rojo.svg.

features_verified.logo_home_hero: ✓ /ucan-logo-rojo.svg with h-28 sm:h-36 lg:h-44 classes and data-testid='home-logo'
features_verified.blind_review_publish_after: ✓ New reviews have publish_after = now + 7 days
features_verified.blind_review_message: ✓ Response includes message about blind publishing
features_verified.provider_profile_published_only: ✓ Provider detail only shows published reviews
features_verified.provider_given_reviews: ✓ Endpoint returns reviews with published status for UI

blind_review_logic_notes.mutual_publish: On create, if counterpart unpublished review exists, both get published=true
blind_review_logic_notes.auto_publish: GET endpoints check publish_after and update published=true if expired
blind_review_logic_notes.legacy_handling: Old reviews without published field treated as published (using $or in query)
